top3.title: Bass Strait Decommissioning Infrastructure Upgrade (Barry Beach) — Fleet CAPEX
top3.company: Unknown (related to Bass Strait operators like ExxonMobil)
top3.pitch: Barry Beach is undergoing a facelift to prepare for the safe return, dismantling, and recycling of offshore structures from the Bass Strait. Qube has been awarded the contract to begin these upgrades.
top3.ctaAction: Contact Sam Leszczynski, General Manager - Mining Services to discuss application, timing, equipment package, and contractor route-to-buy.

top3.title: Olympic Dam Expansion — BHP — Direct CAPEX
top3.pitch: Ongoing expansion and optimisation of BHP's Olympic Dam copper-uranium mine in South Australia. Includes underground mine development, processing plant upgrades, and tailings management.

top3.title: Snowy 2.0 Hydroelectric Project — Multi-Line PT
top3.pitch: The Snowy 2.0 pumped-hydro expansion project is facing budget exhaustion, delays, and cost overruns. It involves significant underground tunnelling and infrastructure development.
